claim: A causal recovery in seven-day Bitcoin hash-rate growth after a recent miner-security contraction, confirmed by restored block cadence, marks an easing of miner operating pressure that supports the following seven-day BTC return.

source_contract.availability: the current observation and every reference observation are usable only according to recorded AssetEODCompletionTime
source_contract.stale_backfill: rows with source lag above three days may seed later strictly causal references after publication but may never emit a signal
source_contract.revision_boundary: file hashes freeze this downloaded vintage; live promotion additionally requires forward-vintage parity

causal_feature_contract.hash_change_z: current hash_change standardized against at most the last 180 earlier finite hash_change observations whose available_at is strictly earlier; require 120
causal_feature_contract.recent_stress: at least one of the prior 14 observation-date hash_change_z values, causally available before the current row, is <= -1.0
causal_feature_contract.recovery_cross: current hash_change_z >= 0 and the immediately prior observation-date hash_change_z < 0, with that prior row already available
causal_feature_contract.eligible: finite causal features, source lag <=3 days, recent_stress, recovery_cross, and cadence_recovered
causal_feature_contract.event: every eligible recovery cross; the cross itself prevents state repeats

support_freeze_before_returns.failure_action: reject without loading any post-entry market outcome

execution_contract.decision: only after the source row available_at and causal features are fixed
execution_contract.entry: one complete five-minute latency bar after earliest_tradable_open
execution_contract.exit: scheduled open 2,016 five-minute bars (seven days) after entry
execution_contract.nonoverlap: one active trade; ignored overlapping recovery events never delay-enter
execution_contract.cagr: full wall-clock split including warm-up and idle cash
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM, favorable-before-adverse held OHLC, funding, entry/exit/hypothetical-liquidation costs

controls.direction_flip: same clock, short side; diagnostic only
controls.cadence_confirmation_removed: hash recovery cross without block-cadence check
controls.stale_hash_state_7d: all hash recovery inputs delayed seven observations
controls.random_clock: same yearly trade counts and seven-day hold
controls.constant_long: nonoverlapping weekly long exposure on the same calendar
controls.mechanism_rule: reject if cadence-removed or stale-hash control independently passes all primary gates; controls can never replace the frozen primary

orthogonality_gate_after_performance.comparison_set: gross-3.85 live anchor plus all previously promoted sleeves

post_selection_sequence.terminal_failure: write rejection artifact and keep every later period sealed

rejection_contract: any support, performance, mechanism, or orthogonality failure rejects MCR-7 without changing lookbacks, thresholds, side, latency, hold, or costs
